the analysis is straightforward.\n\n7. **Score Consistency:**\n   - The scores are consistent with the analysis, reflecting the benign nature of these files.\n\n**Overall Conclusion:**\n- These files are standard autogenerated artifacts—TypeScript declaration files and source maps.\n- They contain no executable code, no data handling, and no malicious indicators.\n- The risk, malware, and obfuscated scores should remain at 0.\n- The confidence remains high (1), as the analysis is clear and supported by the evidence.\n\n**My own assessment:**\n- **Malware score:** 0\n- **Obfuscated:** 0\n- **Risk score:** 0\n\nThese files are safe and pose no security threat.",
